about.intro1: What is a journey? That long adventure stretching from the first breath we draw to the moment we close our eyes for the last time... Sometimes it is only a deep memory unfolding within the heart alone, straining against the borders of time and space...
about.intro2: Our group is a gathering that has lit its fire and steeped its tea along this long road – to stop, to rest, to breathe... In this pause, we talk and share as much as our tongues allow, as much as our hearts can give...
about.intro3: This waystation is open to all... The ground we sit upon is earth... Our provision is a smile...
about.intro4: As the Master once said: "We are all travellers – so we came, so we shall go."
